revision.comment: moved [[Template:Cite news]] to [[Template:News reference]]: moved back due to miscomprehendsion. Please see talk. Do not move again
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[Template:News reference]]

revision.comment: break redirect. This was done due to misunderstanding
revision.text: Do not use [[template:Cite news]]. This is under development.

revision.comment: code from news reference but now with new parameter names. This template is now incompatible with {{news reference}}
org -> publisher as in {{cite book}}, {{cite web}}
added new param work
rm dev notice. This is released now.
don't use curly quotes
deqiffifying, for great justice
[[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions]]
+vi:
replaced comma with period in line with other templates.
curly quotes :)
optional curly quotes
Add interwiki zh
Added "coauthors" variable for news articles authored by more than one person (quite common)
coauthors
automatically wikilink date
rm date autolinking - see [[Template talk:Cite news#Date conversions|talk]]
"URL accessed" → "Retrieved on" for consistency with current {{[[template:cite web]]}}, and minor template code reformatting
Added usage information (in noinclude section)
/* Usage */ fixed visible description
Made all 3 main cite templates match
revision.text:
{{#if: {{{title|}}} |{{#if: {{{first|}}}{{{last|}}} |{{#if: {{{last|}}} |{{{last}}},  }}{{{first|}}}{{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }},  |{{#if: {{{author|}}} |{{{author|}}}{{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }}.  }} }}{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} |[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] |{{{title}}} }}{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}}{{#if: {{{work|}}} |, ''{{{work}}}''}}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} |, ''{{{publisher}}}'' }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} |, {{{date}}} }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} |, pp. {{{pages}}} |{{#if: {{{page|}}} |, p. {{{page}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} |. Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]] }}.|Template error: argument '''title''' is required.}} __NOTOC__ This template is used to [[WP:CITE|cite sources]] in Wikipedia. It is specifically for news sources. == Usage == 
{{cite news 
 |first = 
 |last = 
 |author = 
 |coauthors =
 |url = 
 |title = 
 |work = 
 |publisher = 
 |pages = 
 |page = 
 |date = 
 |accessdate = 
}}
*'''title''' is required, rest is optional. * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''coauthors''' allows additional authors * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''date''': date of publication. [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format recommended. May be [[m:Help:Preferences#Date_format|wikilinked]] to enable [http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Preferences#prefsection-4 date user preferences]. * '''accessdate''': Date when item was accessed. Use [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''pages''' overrides '''page''' __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Cite sources]]: Style guide * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles/Generic citations]]: Related templates * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikicite]] * [[Template:Cite web]] * [[Template:Cite book]] [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích báo]] [[zh:Cite news]]

revision.comment: interwiki cs
revision.text:
{{#if: {{{title|}}} |{{#if: {{{first|}}}{{{last|}}} |{{#if: {{{last|}}} |{{{last}}},  }}{{{first|}}}{{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }},  |{{#if: {{{author|}}} |{{{author|}}}{{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }}.  }} }}{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} |[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] |{{{title}}} }}{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}}{{#if: {{{work|}}} |, ''{{{work}}}''}}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} |, ''{{{publisher}}}'' }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} |, {{{date}}} }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} |, pp. {{{pages}}} |{{#if: {{{page|}}} |, p. {{{page}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} |. Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]] }}.|Template error: argument '''title''' is required.}} __NOTOC__ This template is used to [[WP:CITE|cite sources]] in Wikipedia. It is specifically for news sources. == Usage == 
{{cite news 
 |first = 
 |last = 
 |author = 
 |coauthors =
 |url = 
 |title = 
 |work = 
 |publisher = 
 |pages = 
 |page = 
 |date = 
 |accessdate = 
}}
*'''title''' is required, rest is optional. * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''coauthors''' allows additional authors * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''date''': date of publication. [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format recommended. May be [[m:Help:Preferences#Date_format|wikilinked]] to enable [http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Preferences#prefsection-4 date user preferences]. * '''accessdate''': Date when item was accessed. Use [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''pages''' overrides '''page''' __NOEDITSECTION__ {{esoteric}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:Cite sources]]: Style guide * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles/Generic citations]]: Related templates * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikicite]] * [[Template:Cite web]] * [[Template:Cite book]] [[Category:Citation templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[cs:Šablona:Citace novin]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích báo]] [[zh:Cite news]]

 |first = 
 |last = 
 |author = 
 |coauthors =
 |url = 
 |title = 
 |work = 
 |publisher = 
 |pages = 
 |page =

*'''title''' is required, rest is optional. * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''coauthors''' allows additional authors * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''date''': date of publication. <includeonly>{{#if: {{{title|}}}
  |{{#if: {{{author|}}}{{{last|}}}
    | {{#if: {{{authorlink|}}}
      | [[{{{authorlink}}}|{{#if: {{{last|}}}
        | {{{last}}}{{#if: {{{first|}}} | , {{{first}}} }}

revision.comment: <noinclude>[[Category:引用テンプレート]]</noinclude>
revision.text:
{{#if: {{{title|}}} |{{#if: {{{first|}}}{{{last|}}} |{{#if: {{{last|}}} |{{{last}}},  }}{{{first|}}}{{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }},  |{{#if: {{{author|}}} |{{{author|}}}{{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| ; {{{coauthors}}} }}.  }} }}{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|“|"}}{{#if: {{{url|}}} |[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}] |{{{title}}} }}{{#if: {{{curly|}}}|”|"}}{{#if: {{{work|}}} |, ''{{{work}}}''}}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}} |, ''{{{publisher}}}'' }}{{#if: {{{date|}}} |, {{{date}}} }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}} |, pp. {{{pages}}} |{{#if: {{{page|}}} |, p. {{{page}}} }} }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}} |. Retrieved on [[{{{accessdate}}}]] }}.{{#if: {{{language|}}} | (written in {{{language|}}}) }}|Template error: argument '''title''' is required.}} __NOTOC__ This template is used to [[WP:CITE|cite sources]] in Wikipedia. It is specifically for news sources. == Usage == 
{{cite news 
 |first = 
 |last = 
 |author = 
 |coauthors =
 |url = 
 |title = 
 |work = 
 |publisher = 
 |pages = 
 |page = 
 |date = 
 |accessdate = 
 |language = 
}}

{{cite news | first = | last = | author = | coauthors =| url = | title = | work = | publisher = | pages = | page = | date = | accessdate = | language = }}
*'''title''' is required, rest is optional. * '''author''': Author ** '''last''' works with '''first''' to produce last, first ** '''coauthors''' allows additional authors * '''publisher''': Publisher, if any. * '''date''': date of publication. [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format recommended. If the whole date is known it should be [[m:Help:Preferences#Date_format|wikilinked]] to enable [http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Preferences#prefsection-4 date user preferences]. * '''accessdate''': Date when item was accessed. Use [[ISO 8601]] YYYY-MM-DD format. Do not wikilink the date. * '''work''': If this item is part of a larger work, name of that work. * '''pages''' overrides '''page''' * '''language''': the language the source is written in __NOEDITSECTION__ {{複雑なテンプレート}} ==See also== * [[Wikipedia:出典を明記する]]: Style guide * [[Template:Cite web]] * [[Template:Cite book]] [[Category:引用テンプレート|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:条件文|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[cs:Šablona:Citace novin]] [[pl:Szablon:Cytuj news]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Chú thích báo]] [[zh:Cite news]]

revision.comment: ロボットによる: 文字置き換え (-{{{{FULLPAGENAME}}/doc}} +{{Documentation}})
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{{title|}}}
  |{{#if: {{{first|}}}{{{last|}}}
    |{{#if: {{{last|}}}
      |{{{last}}}, 
  }}{{{first|}}}{{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| <nowiki>;</nowiki> {{{coauthors}}} }}, 
    |{{#if: {{{author|}}}
      |{{{author|}}}{{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| <nowiki>;</nowiki> {{{coauthors}}} }}. 
  }}
  }}“{{#if: {{{url|}}}
    |[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]
    |{{{title}}}
  }}”{{#if: {{{work|}}}
    |,  ''{{{work}}}''}}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}}
    |, ''{{{publisher}}}''
  }}{{#if: {{{date|}}}
    |, {{{date}}}
  }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}}
    |, pp. {{{pages}}}
    |{{#if: {{{page|}}}
      |, p. {{{page}}}
    }}
  }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}}  
  |. {{{accessdate}}}閲覧
  }}.{{#if: {{{language|}}}
  | （{{{language|}}}）
  }}{{#if: {{{quote|}}}
  | “{{{quote}}}”
  }}|Template error: argument '''title''' is required.}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{複雑なテンプレート}}
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 引数 language
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{{title|}}}
  |{{#if: {{{first|}}}{{{last|}}}
    |{{#if: {{{last|}}}
      |{{{last}}}, 
  }}{{{first|}}}{{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| <nowiki>;</nowiki> {{{coauthors}}} }}, 
    |{{#if: {{{author|}}}
      |{{{author|}}}{{#if: {{{coauthors|}}}| <nowiki>;</nowiki> {{{coauthors}}} }}. 
  }}
  }}“{{#if: {{{url|}}}
    |[{{{url}}} {{{title}}}]
    |{{{title}}}
  }}”{{#if: {{{language|}}}
  | ({{{language|}}})
  }}{{#if: {{{work|}}}
    |,  ''{{{work}}}''}}{{#if: {{{publisher|}}}
    |, {{{publisher}}}
  }}{{#if: {{{date|}}}
    |, {{{date}}}
  }}{{#if: {{{pages|}}}
    |, pp. {{{pages}}}
    |{{#if: {{{page|}}}
      |, p. {{{page}}}
    }}
  }}{{#if: {{{accessdate|}}}  
  |. {{{accessdate}}} 閲覧。
  |.}}{{#if: {{{quote|}}}
  | “{{{quote}}}”
  }}|Template error: argument '''title''' is required.}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

Support semicolon as separator - see [[Template talk:Citation]]
fix default separator using a variant of [[User:droll]]'s fix; see [[Template talk:Cite web#Change in default separator and minor bug]]
fix empty separator case
Don't pass an empty URL parameter (to fix error message described at [[Template_talk:Citation/core]])
add preliminary translation feature -- please revert if any new problem is encountered, will add docs later
testing support for periodicals
test - should not affect other params except trans_title

+提案
